title: Layer 2: Dollar System Indicators
title_zh: 第二层：美元体系消耗指标
desc: The shockwave hits dollar system load-bearing walls
desc_zh: 冲击波打在美元体系的承重墙上

treasuryAuctionCoverage.threshold_zh: 持续低于2.0 = 需求担忧
treasuryAuctionCoverage.note: Monitor indirect bidder share for foreign demand signal
treasuryAuctionCoverage.note_zh: 关注间接投标者占比——外国需求信号

ticHoldings.threshold_zh: 持续3个季度下降 = 结构性
ticHoldings.note: China + Japan + Saudi holdings declining; 2-month reporting lag
ticHoldings.note_zh: 中日沙特持仓均在下降；报告滞后2个月

centralBankGold.threshold_zh: 持续60吨+/月 = 结构性转变
centralBankGold.note: China: 18th consecutive monthly purchase. Poland, Uzbekistan also buyers.
centralBankGold.note_zh: 中国连续第18个月增持。波兰、乌兹别克也持续买入。

dxyOilCorrelation.threshold_zh: 低于+0.2 = 美元不再被认为'最硬的资产'
dxyOilCorrelation.note: Historical: oil up → dollar up (petrodollar recycling). Breaking = significant
dxyOilCorrelation.note_zh: 历史规律：油价涨→美元涨（石油美元循环）。打破此规律=重要信号

swiftRmbShare.note: Monthly publication. Trending up but from very low base vs USD (~47%)
swiftRmbShare.note_zh: 月度发布。虽然上升但基数远低于美元(~47%)

cipsRmbVolume.value_zh: 约480万亿人民币（年化估算）
cipsRmbVolume.threshold: CIPS volume growing faster than SWIFT share — real picture
cipsRmbVolume.threshold_zh: CIPS增速超过SWIFT份额增速——这才是真实图景
cipsRmbVolume.note: CIPS covers Russia, Middle East, ASEAN trade bypassing SWIFT. True RMB internationalization is higher than SWIFT data shows.
cipsRmbVolume.note_zh: CIPS覆盖俄罗斯、中东、东盟的贸易，绕过SWIFT。真实的人民币国际化程度比SWIFT数据显示的要高。
